results.title: England coach hails squad after securing semifinal spot
results.description: MIAMI, United States, July 11 (Xinhua) -- England head coach Thomas Tuchel praised his team's resilience after a brace from Jude Bellingham propelled the side into the World Cup semifinals with a 2-1 comeback victory over Norway on Saturday. "In my heart, there's no doubt I'm proud and happy," Tuchel said at the post-match press conference. "I feel so connected to this team because they just do whatever it takes

results.title: Noskova outlasts Muchova to claim maiden Wimbledon title in thrilling all-Czech final
results.description: Linda Noskova survived the agony of squandering five match points to outlast compatriot Karolina Muchova and capture her maiden Grand Slam crown, extending the Czech Republic's remarkable Wimbledon success story.

results.title: Holloway TKOs McGregor in Round 1 After Leg Injury at UFC 329
results.description: (MENAFN) Max Holloway stopped Conor McGregor via first-round technical knockout Saturday after the Irish star suffered an apparent leg injury early in their welterweight showdown at UFC 329, while ...

results.title: Shreyas Iyer Reveals Why India Dropped Vaibhav Sooryavanshi: 'I Was The Only One...'
results.description: India dropped Vaibhav Sooryavanshi from their playing XI for the fifth T20I against England with Sanju Samson replacing him.

results.title: TalkSPORT star’s car broken into and iPad is stolen during England’s World Cup win over Norway
results.description: JAMIE O’HARA has revealed his car was broken into during England’s World Cup win over Norway. The Three Lions pulled off a comeback win thanks to a brace from Jude Bellingham. But while England were in action in Miami and talkSPORT star O'Hara was watching, his car was being trashed. The former Tottenham Hotspur star's...

results.title: Neeru Dhanda strikes women’s trap gold
results.description: ISSF Shotgun World Cup Lonato (Italy), July 11: Asian Championships gold medallist Neeru Dhanda clinched her maiden ISSF World Cup title with a dazzling performance, ending India’s wait for an individual shotgun medal on the global stage this year by winning gold in the women’s trap event at the ISSF World Cup in Lonato on [...]
